title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0904
summary: Ravi Kumar @ Sonu and co-accused Ashwani Dubey were convicted for murdering a TSR driver, Sarvesh Kumar, in furtherance of a robbery on 28 January 2004. The victim was last seen with the accused, and his blood-stained scooter and belongings were later recovered from the accused.
